reviews.review_title: Watermark makes this bandicam but in vr
reviews.review_description:
Most of the reviews here either are confused on what the app is or it's functions are which is perfectly normal. Yes you do need a PC to route the software to. You can store .mp4 files on the headset.

The only sad thing is you can record in full and you can only Livestream without a watermark with a $5.99 per month subscription instead of paying a one time fee to use the software as long as you own it.

I downloaded this app hoping it would be able to stream your games and VR screen, I was proven wrong. As soon as you exit the app it cancels your streaming/recording, leaving you with a disappointing recording. I would recommend buying a HDMI game capture card and using OBS instead. 1 Star.
I was told this was free and only on sidequest and was sent here.

The streaming works until it doesn’t. You can’t stream your games, it just ends it. Was excited to try it out but not worth it until they fix this and make it compatible to being able to stream and game at the same time
The tutorial is completely useless. I have no idea what that squeaky  sound is saying. I played it several times and I have no clue what to do.
New face tracking is available as well as importing avatars are more challenging than easy

developer_response.body: Face tracking requires a Quest Pro to function.  Make sure the feature is enabled in the Oculus Settings if you're experiencing any problems.

reviews.review_description: It has a bug that doesn’t  let me type my device ip for full body tracking
Cant get it to Stream to Twitch/You tube. Do i need PC
The app can record in 3rd person AND first person at the same time!  Bonkers.
Very good features and easy to use.  I was streaming with my avatar in no time :)

reviews.review_title: Stream code copy paste isn't working
reviews.review_description: I have tried setting up a stream in a free version and couldn't copypaste the stream code from other source, it was a very unpleasant experience, besides that, I couldn't use keyboard in the app to type numbers and symbols.

developer_response.body:
You can actually use the Web Portal to simplify the process.  This allows you to connect directly to your Quest from any browser on the same wifi network and copy/paste your stream codes directly.  No more typing in VR required!

You can find the web portal here:  https://vstreamer.live/webportal/

reviews.review_description:
This is a great concept and be fun to use but there needs to be a better help function. I have tried streaming to twitch, used the stream key for my channel but it says it failed but won't tell me what failed

Edit: the discord link didn't seem too work, also i seem unable to delete the key to try again be nice to be able to copy and paste so you wouldn't need to type that long thing in

developer_response.body:
UPDATE - happy to report we've made a much easier way to enter your stream keys.  Go to https://VStreamer.live/webportal for details.  The web portal will allow you to copy / paste the key.
---
Thank you for bringing that to my attention.  Personally, I've noticed the font used in the Twitch key makes it difficult to differentiate between lower case L and uppercase I.  Same for O and zero.  We're building a knowledge base with guides to help people get started.  You can find it at https://VStreamer.Live/Knowledge-base - its still being filled in.  You can also find us directly in our discord.  The invite is at https://VStreamer.Live
